revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23177433986|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Continent-based_templates here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Continent-based_templates for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Navbox
| name = Continent-based templates
| title = Comparison of [[:Category:Continent templates|continent-based templates]]
| state = {{{state|{{{1<includeonly>|collapsed</includeonly>}}}}}}
| tracking = no <!-- keep all the documented templates out of the hlist tracking category -->
| listclass=hlist
| group1 = World
| list1 =
* {{tl|Continents of Earth}}
* {{tl|Regions of the world}}
* {{tl|Lists of sovereign states and dependent territories by continent}}
* {{tl|World topic}}
* {{tl|World map indicating continents}}

|group2= Generator
|list2= {{navbox|subgroup|
|list1=
* {{tl|Africa topic}}
* {{tl|Asia topic}}
* {{tl|Europe topic}}
* {{tl|Oceania topic}}
* {{tl|North America topic}}
* {{tl|South America topic}}
* {{tl|Americas topic}}

|list2=
* {{tl|African topic}}
* {{tl|Asian topic}}
* {{tl|European topic}}
* {{tl|Oceanian topic}}
* {{tl|North American topic}}
* {{tl|South American topic}}

|list3=
* {{tl|Continent topic}}
* {{tl|Caribbean topic}}
* {{tl|Central America topic}}
* {{tl|Latin America and the Caribbean topic}}
* {{tl|Middle East topic}}
* {{tl|Southeast Asia topic}}
}}

|group3=Countries of...
|list3=
* {{tla|Countries of Africa|...Africa}}
* {{tla|Countries of Asia|...Asia}}
* {{tla|Sovereign states of Europe|...Europe}}
* {{tla|Countries and territories of Oceania|...Oceania}}
* {{tla|Countries of North America|...North America}}
* {{tla|Countries of South America|...South America}}

|group4=List of...capitals
|list4=
* {{tla|List of African capitals|...African...}}
* {{tla|List of Asian capitals by region|...Asian...}}
* {{tla|List of European capitals by region|...European...}}
* {{tla|List of Oceanian capitals by region|...Oceanian...}}
* {{tla|List of North American capitals|...North American...}}
* {{tla|List of South American capitals|...South American...}}

|group5=Regions of...
|list5= {{navbox|subgroup|
|list1=
* {{tla|Regions of Africa|...Africa}}
* {{tla|Regions of Asia|...Asia}}
* {{tla|Regions of Europe|...Europe}}
* {{tla|Regions of Oceania|...Oceania}}
* {{tla|Regions of North America|...North America}}
* {{tla|Regions of South America|...South America}}

|list2=
* {{tl|Polar regions}}
* {{tl|List of seas}}
* {{tl|Hemispheres of Earth}}
}}

|below={{icon|category}} [[:Category:Configurable area-topic templates|'''Category''']]

}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
